# File Bankruptcy Without a Lawyer - Pro Se Guide [2026]
> How to file Chapter 7 or Chapter 13 bankruptcy without a lawyer. Forms, fees, means test, and court procedures. Complete 2026 pro se filin...

## About
filebankruptcywithoutlawyer.com is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.
